subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth is verily the Dawning-Place of His signs and the Dayspring of His bounties. None can withhold Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق انه لمطلع آیاته و مشرق الطافه لا تمنعه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun, @suffering and imprisonment
